/opt/rh/gcc-toolset-13/root/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -D__STDC_FORMAT_MACROS  -fPIC -std=gnu++17 -Werror -Wno-covered-switch-default -fvisibility=hidden -O3 -DNDEBUG  -Wl,--gc-sections  -Wl,--exclude-libs,ALL -shared -Wl,-soname,libMLIRDialectPlugin.so.23.0git -o libMLIRDialectPlugin.so.23.0git CMakeFiles/MLIRDialectPlugin.dir/DialectPluginTypes.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MLIRDialectPlugin.dir/DialectPluginDialect.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MLIRDialectPlugin.dir/DialectPluginOps.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MLIRDialectPlugin.dir/DialectPluginPasses.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,"\$ORIGIN/../lib:" -lstdc++fs /usr/local/lib/libMLIRPass.a /usr/local/lib/libLLVMSupport.a /usr/local/lib/libMLIRSupport.a /usr/local/lib/libMLIRArithDialect.a -lTritonNVIDIAGPUToLLVM /usr/local/lib/libLLVMSupport.a /usr/local/lib/libMLIRAnalysis.a /usr/local/lib/libMLIRDataLayoutInterfaces.a /usr/local/lib/libMLIRInferStridedMetadataInterface.a /usr/local/lib/libMLIRLoopLikeInterface.a /usr/local/lib/libMLIRControlFlowInterfaces.a /usr/local/lib/libMLIRFunctionInterfaces.a /usr/local/lib/libMLIRCallInterfaces.a /usr/local/lib/libMLIRPresburger.a /usr/local/lib/libMLIRSideEffectInterfaces.a /usr/local/lib/libMLIRViewLikeInterface.a /usr/local/lib/libMLIRCastInterfaces.a /usr/local/lib/libMLIRDialect.a /usr/local/lib/libMLIRInferIntRangeCommon.a /usr/local/lib/libMLIRShapedOpInterfaces.a /usr/local/lib/libMLIRInferIntRangeInterface.a /usr/local/lib/libMLIRInferTypeOpInterface.a /usr/local/lib/libMLIRUBDialect.a /usr/local/lib/libMLIRIR.a /usr/local/lib/libMLIRSupport.a /usr/local/lib/libLLVMSupport.a -lrt -ldl -lm /usr/lib64/libz.so /usr/lib64/libzstd.so /usr/local/lib/libLLVMDemangle.a -lpthread
